summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Chef movie recommendation app's actor impact algorithm implementation. All core functionality verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: API Health Check - Chef API responding correctly
Trending Movies API - Returns movies with enhanced metadata
Movie Data Structure - All expected fields present (id, title, genres, poster_url, backdrop_url)
Profile Insights API - Returns expected structure (genres, actors, directors)
Actor Impact Metrics - Complete impact data with avg_impact, roles, primary_role, filmography_count
Actor Role Classification - Correctly classifies actors as lead/supporting/background
Movie Metadata Caching - Enhanced metadata system integrated
Curated Recommendations API - Returns personalized recommendations with scoring
Familiarity Boost Integration - Recommendations include curated_score and match_percentage
User Authentication - Test user registration and login working
Watch History Management - Successfully adds movies to user's watch history
Actor Impact Algorithm Functions - classify_actor_role, calculate_actor_impact, count_cast_by_role working
Cast Data with Order and Popularity - Movie metadata includes billing order and popularity fields
Profile Insights Actor Ranking - Uses impact-weighted scores for favorite actors

success_percentage.frontend: Not tested - Backend only testing as requested
